name: Kurdan's Nord Hunter
bio:
Physical Appearance: Nord male. Wears light armor including a cuirass, greaves, boots, and carries a shield, with possible gauntlets and helmet. Beneath his armor he wears lower-class shoes and trousers. Wields a longsword.
Race: Nord
Personality Keywords: bloodthirsty, sadistic, predatory, merciless, relentless
Role: Kurdan's Nord Hunter is one of three hunters who paid Kurdan gro-Dragol for the thrill of hunting humanoid prey at Fort Grief. He and the other hunters participate in what Kurdan calls the Hunter's Run, where wealthy clients pay great sums to hunt and kill living human victims with no questions asked.
Home Location Information: Fort Grief, specifically within the Hunter's Run section of the dungeon.
Daily Routine: The Nord Hunter wanders his area of the dungeon all day and night, never sleeping or eating, simply waiting for prey to arrive.
The Hunt: The hunters are wealthy clients who have paid Kurdan to participate in the ultimate hunt. They fight to the death and refuse to accept yields. The only way to escape Fort Grief is to descend into the Hunter's Run, kill the hunters, and take the key one of them carries to unlock the door - these are Kurdan's rules.
Personality - The Merciless Predator: The Nord Hunter is bloodthirsty and sadistic, having paid for the privilege of hunting human beings. He is relentless in his pursuit and shows no mercy, fighting to the death rather than accepting surrender. His participation in Kurdan's enterprise reveals a cruel nature willing to pay for the thrill of killing innocent people.
author: Bethesda
